title: Rollback Scope Analysis
description: Schema readiness for rollback scope analysis, covering affected services, dependency impact, data migration reversal, and rollback risk assessment.

fields.name: affected_services_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for listing services affected by a rollback

fields.name: dependency_impact_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for analyzing downstream dependency impact of rollback

fields.name: data_migration_reversal_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for assessing data migration reversal requirements

fields.name: rollback_risk_assessment_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for scoring rollback risk based on scope factors

fields.name: rollback_cost_estimate_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for estimating time and resource cost of rollback

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real scope analysis execution, no dependency mapping, no risk scoring. Scope analysis remains non-functional.
